about.title: ABOUT
about.bio: Hey — I'm Mert. I wear many hats: full-stack engineer, AI tinkerer, and someone who genuinely obsesses over shipping clean, scalable code. I've been in the trenches building enterprise APIs, LLM-powered tools, and ERP systems that hundreds of people rely on daily.
about.bio2: I don't just write code that works — I sweat the details until it feels right. Every project is a chance to bridge the gap between deep technical craft and thoughtful, human-centered design.

fullstack.title: Full Stack
fullstack.desc: Shipping production-ready web apps with React, Node.js, .NET, TypeScript — the whole nine yards

fullstack.desc: Full-cycle web development from the ground up — API design, database architecture, and polished frontends. I handle the whole stack so you don't have to.

ai.desc: Taking AI from proof-of-concept to production-grade. RAG pipelines, model fine-tuning, and custom AI assistants that actually move the needle for your business.
